action.reasoning: Observation: last run partially succeeded: the clean cached-feature linear probe reached strong local val worst-region 0.3753, but training crashed during the blend stage due to a CPU/CUDA mismatch, and train.py/predict.py remain truncated in workspace. Analysis: the core pipeline is good again; the failure is an implementation bug in ensemble/blend handling, not model quality. With 7 iterations and >4h left, the highest-value move is to fully rewrite complete stable files, fix device placement, train a clean linear probe only (the best-generalizing head so far), verify local val, and immediately submit that checkpoint to lock in a likely improvement over 0.2568 hidden-test. Decision: write complete model.py/train.py/predict.py for the cached CLIP feature linear-probe pipeline, run a fast refresh/train/eval, then submit the resulting checkpoint.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 12 --lr 0.003 --weight_decay 1e-4 --batch_size 1024 --feature_batch_size 256 --num_workers 8 --checkpoint checkpoints/clip_cached_linear_v3.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/clip_cached_linear_v3.pt --output baseline_val_preds.json
